title: Runtime Guard local state
description: Stored at .architecture-due-diligence/runtime_guard_state.json inside the target repo. One file per repo; not designed for concurrent sessions auditing the same repo at the same time.

mode.description: Set explicitly via `python3 scripts/runtime_guard.py set-mode <mode>`. Never inferred automatically -- inference from prompt text only produces a reminder, never a mode change.

changed_files.description: File paths touched by Write/Edit/MultiEdit/NotebookEdit since the mode was last set.

risky_actions.description: category:path entries recorded when a changed file matched a reminder category (auth, dependencies, deployment, migrations).

verification_commands.description: Bash commands observed that matched guard/rules.json verification_command_markers.

stop_block_count.description: How many times the Stop hook has already blocked completion this mode-session. Capped by stop_block_limit in rules.json so the guard can never hang the session.

last_prompt_summary.description: First 200 chars of the most recent user prompt, kept for debugging only.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the last state write.
